title: AI Customer Service Agents For Quality CX At Scale | Ada
heroSubhead: AI customer service agents that resolve, act, and continuously improve. Designed for scale. Trusted by global brands.

allHeadings.text: Elevate your CX with AI agents proven to outperform humans
Ada ACX: The AI customer experience operating model
AI purpose-built for your industry's toughest challenges
Trusted by the world's leading enterprises
Deliver extraordinary experiences on all the channels
42% reduction in average agent handle time
A teammate that delivers a notch above
Power personalized AI experiences at scale with Ada's ACX Platform
Insights to shape the future of AI-powered CX
Why AI agents get harder to scale, and how Playbooks solves it
Ask the expert: Why resolution is the real test of voice AI
Beyond FAQs: How leading brands automate complex customer service workflows with AI
AI customer service by industry: Where trust has been earned

animLib: GSAP ScrollTrigger + Lottie (light) + Swiper + CountUp + Alpine.js + Wistia video embeds. Framework: Astro SSG. No full GSAP core on window — ScrollTrigger bundled separately. Lottie confirmed on window.

imagery.notes: Hero section has no video/canvas/img detected as direct child — likely uses CSS background or Lottie animation. 5 video elements on page (Wistia embeds). 49 SVGs (icons + illustrations). 74 imgs (logos, case study thumbnails, team/brand shots).

framework: Astro (static site generator) — scripts follow _astro/ bundle naming convention
footerText: Platform | Overview | Practice | Experts | Playbooks | Integrations | Channels: Messaging, Voice, Email | Industries: Ecommerce, Financial Services, Gaming, Health Insurance, Property Insurance, Technology, Travel | Resources: ACX Academy, Blog, Events, Customers, Documentation, Resource Library | Ada Labs: Overview, Applied AI research, Ada Labs blog, Applied AI careers | Company: Why Ada?, Careers, Media Center, Become a partner, Trust center
